metadata.description: XVE time tracking marketplace: Kimai timesheet management, ActivityWatch passive analysis, and XVE customer config. Bridges local activity data to billable hours.

plugins.name: kimai
plugins.description: Kimai time tracking agent with slash commands for logging time, starting/stopping timers, and viewing timesheet entries. Supports 15-min rounding, multi-timer disambiguation, JIRA+PR description format, and one-entry-per-issue discipline.

plugins.name: activitywatch
plugins.description: ActivityWatch analysis agent with slash commands for querying time per project from window, browser, editor, and terminal watchers. Includes setup audit command and Kimai gap analysis.

plugins.name: xve
plugins.description: XVE-specific config: customer/project mapping (DWB, Nassau, BTB, AUWS, Edumatch, Anno), combined AW+Kimai status, install command, and shared customer reference skill.
